title: INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: REDMOND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT INPATIENT WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medically-managed detox. 676 NE Maple Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (458) 218-2027 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 218-2027 Withdrawal Management Referral Line Alternate (541) 316-7520 After hours and weekends Withdrawal Management Referral Line INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Jefferson,and Klamath Counties Services: Detoxification Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
